text: Aaj phir saas ne sabke samne meri comparison nanad se ki aur kaha ki uska ghar aur bacche meri wajah se hi 'toote' nahi hain. Us argument ke baad se mere sir mein itna bhayanak dard hai jaise nasein phat jayengi aur aankhon ke aage bilkul andhera chha gaya hai. Badan itna toot raha hai ki mujhse kitchen tak jane ki himmat nahi ho rahi, bas thakan se bura haal hai.

Jab saas ne taana maara ki unki beti ne career aur parivaar dono sambhale aur main ek talaqshuda hokar bhi bojh hoon, mere pet mein ajeeb si jalan shuru ho gayi. Kal raat se kuch bhi hazam nahi ho raha aur seene mein aisi bhari-pan hai jaise koi aag lagi ho. Is joint family ke kalesh mein meri tabiyat itni gir gayi hai ki haath-pair bilkul thande pad gaye hain.

Har waqt saas ka domination aur unki beti se comparison sunte-sunte mera gala ghutne lagta hai aur dimaag sunn ho jata hai. Aaj phir wahi behes hui aur tabse meri saans phool rahi hai, lagta hai jaise dil par kisi ne bhari pathar rakh diya ho. Itni kamzori aa gayi hai ki baccho ko khilate waqt bhi mere haath kaanp rahe hain par main kisi ko bata nahi sakti.

Privacy toh zero hai is ghar mein, upar se saas ne aaj phir mere 'failed rishta' par chot ki aur nanad ki kismat ki tareefo ke pull baandh diye. Us argument ke baad se meri pith aur kandhon mein aisi jakdan ho rahi hai ki main seedhi khadi bhi nahi ho pa rahi hoon. Pura sharir jaise toot raha hai aur ajeeb si bechaini ho rahi hai jisse neend hi nahi aa rahi.

Jab bhi saas bacchon ke samne meri comparison unki 'perfect' bua se karti hain, mere kaano mein seetiyaan bajne lagti hain aur sir chakkar khane lagta hai. Aaj subah se itni thakan hai ki lagta hai bukhar chadh jayega aur pura badan dukh raha hai. Mujhse ab ye community exclusion aur roz ka kalesh bardaasht nahi ho raha, sharir jawab de raha hai.
